/CAL:RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(D)(1)/CTORD:SENTENCE OF 10-31-97 VACATED/DEF:IS RESENTENCED AS FOLLOWS:/AJW/CH1:SP 10Y: U/667(D)(E)/ENH:CH1:TYPE 667(A)(1)PC:TI 10Y:CS/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 2 TO 4 YEARS, THE MIDDLE TERM, CONCURRENT/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 3 TO 2 YEARS, THE MIDDLE TERM, STAYED/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 5 TO 6 MONTHS IN COUNTY JAIL, STAYED/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 6 TO 6 MONTHS IN COUNTY JAIL, STAYED/DEF: ISSENTENCED ON COUNT 7 TO 3 YEARS, THE UPPER TERM, STAYED/X:COURT GRANTS THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS ALL OTHER ALLEGATIONS UNDER PC1385,/X:TOTAL =20 YEARS STATE PRISON,/STATES/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 7,300 DAYS IN TOTAL (EXACT CREDITS TO BE CALCULATED BY CDC)/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED AND ANY EXCESS CREDITS WAIVED TO THE EXTENT OF ALLOWING A STANDARD PAROLE SUPERVISION PERIOD/DNACOMP/X:COURT FURTHER ORDERS FINES AND FEES PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED STAYED BASED ON INABILITY TO PAY,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/PAROLE70/PARDATE:WITHIN 24 HOURSOF RELEASE/PAR70/
/CAL:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS RE PC1170(D) PETITION/X:JUDGE CONROY APPEARS VIAZOOM,/DEF:APPEARS VIA TELEPHONE FROM SAN QUENSTIN STATE PRISON/X:PC1170(D)(D) PETITION IS GRANTED,/

/CAL:PC1170(D)(1) PETITION FOR RESENTENCING/X:COURT WAIVES FILING OF FORMAL PETITION,/DEF:APPEARS VIA TELEPHONE FROM SAN QUENTIN STATE PRISON/X:JUDGE CONROY APPEARS VIA ZOOM,/CONTD:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON PC1170(D) PETITIO
